description: Phase 0 benchmark set for comparing the current local TF backend contract against an AutoGen Core backend design.

cases.task: Review the latest clustering analysis notes, identify the top three operational risks, and summarize them without changing files.
Synthesize the latest experiment notes into a concise findings summary and propose next-step follow-up tasks.
Draft a short handoff report from the recent task outcomes and flag anything that still requires human follow-up.
Implement a small pipeline change in a sandbox branch, run a reviewer pass, and return a success or retry verdict with evidence.
